tools.name: get_disruptions
tools.description: Get current train disruptions from NS API

isActive.description: Filter to only return active disruptions

type.description: Type of disruptions to return (e.g., MAINTENANCE, DISRUPTION)

tools.name: get_travel_advice
tools.description: Get travel advice between two train stations

fromStation.description: Name or code of departure station

toStation.description: Name or code of destination station

dateTime.description: Optional departure/arrival time in ISO format (e.g. 2024-03-20T14:00:00+01:00)

searchForArrival.description: If true, dateTime is treated as desired arrival time instead of departure time

tools.name: get_departures
tools.description: Get list of departing trains from a station

station.description: Station name or code to get departures for

dateTime.description: Optional departure time in ISO format (e.g. 2024-03-20T14:00:00+01:00)

maxJourneys.description: Maximum number of departures to return (default: 40)
